---
title: "Code notebook"
format: html
---

## Notebook Index

This is the landing index for your notebook. Edit pages locally (in `pages/`) and publish — each page will be linked below after rendering.

### 2026

- [TypeScript notebook](pages/ts-notes.html) — 2026-03-10
- [TypeScript Playground](pages/ts-playground.html) — 2026-03-10
- [Configure Next.js scaffold](pages/configure-next.html) — 2026-03-09

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-index.js -->
